description_long: This object is a large, cylindrical metal container with a weathered, rust-streaked surface, reminiscent of an industrial oil drum. The exterior is predominantly a faded, off-white color with extensive brown and reddish rust stains running vertically and horizontally, giving it a distressed, aged appearance. The body is reinforced by two horizontal bands, one near the top and one near the bottom, which add structural rigidity and visual segmentation. The top is flat and appears to be sealed, with no visible openings, spouts, or handles. The surface texture is rough and matte, with visible signs of corrosion and wear, suggesting long-term exposure to the elements. This object would be commonly found in urban environments such as alleys, construction sites, or industrial yards.
description: A large, rusted metal drum with a flat, sealed top and heavily weathered, streaked surface. The cylindrical body is reinforced by two horizontal bands and shows extensive signs of corrosion.
description_view_0: The front view shows the drum's flat, rust-streaked top and the most prominent vertical rust patterns on the body.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a more uniform rust pattern and the horizontal bands are clearly visible.
description_view_2: The drum appears darker and more heavily rusted on this side, with the bands blending into the corroded surface.
description_view_3: This view shows a lighter section of the drum with less rust, and the bands are still visible but less pronounced.
